# DESIGN.md — Design System for Kapruka Gifting Agent
## Generated by /start on 2026-06-14

This design system defines the visual identity, tokens, and component specifications. It synthesizes the editorial elegance of *Beauty in Stem* with the motion design of *Vol Dog Food*, adapted for a premium Sri Lankan lifestyle gallery experience.

---

## 1. Color System

We avoid clinical pure black and white, opting for soft, warm organic tones that reflect Sri Lanka's heritage (tea estates, clay pottery, spices).

| Token | CSS Variable | Hex Value | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Slate Black** | `--color-slate-black` | `#16191e` | Primary typography, headers, main text |
| **Warm Alabaster**| `--color-warm-alabaster` | `#faf8f5` | Body background (organic, soft cream) |
| **Terracotta clay** | `--color-terracotta` | `#e25c3d` | CTAs, active states, focus rings, highlights |
| **Sage Moss** | `--color-sage-moss` | `#4d6b53` | Groceries/fresh category accent colorway |
| **Pure White** | `--color-card-bg` | `#ffffff` | Floating panels, chat containers, product cards |
| **Warm Sand** | `--color-border-warm` | `#e8e6e0` | Subtle layout borders, dividers, inputs |

---

## 2. Typography System

We use high-fashion geometric sans-serif headings paired with highly readable neutral body text and full Sinhala dual-language support.

* **Heading Typeface:** `Outfit` (Google Font)
  * *Weights:* 500 (Medium), 600 (SemiBold), 700 (Bold)
  * *Mood:* Structured, luxurious, premium
* **Body Typeface:** `Inter` (Google Font)
  * *Weights:* 300 (Light), 400 (Regular)
  * *Line Height:* `leading-relaxed` (1.625)
* **Bilingual Sinhala Typeface:** `Noto Sans Sinhala` (Google Font)
  * *Mood:* Clean, modern curves matching the geometric properties of Inter/Outfit.
* **Type Scale:**
  * **Hero Headline:** `text-5xl` (48px) to `text-6xl` (60px) / `tracking-tight`
  * **Section Title (H1):** `text-4xl` (36px) / `font-bold`
  * **Subheader (H2):** `text-2xl` (24px) / `font-semibold`
  * **Card Title (H3):** `text-lg` (18px) / `font-medium`
  * **Body Copy:** `text-base` (16px) / `font-light`
  * **Small Specs / Labels:** `text-sm` (14px) / `uppercase` / `tracking-wider`

---

## 3. Layout Grid & Spacing

* **Base Grid Unit:** 4px (Tailwind: `p-1` = 4px, `p-4` = 16px).
* **Borders:** Thin, soft borders (`border-[1px] border-warm-sand`) instead of solid black.
* **Border Radius:**
  * Large elements (Cards, panels): `rounded-2xl` (16px)
  * Medium elements (Inputs, buttons): `rounded-lg` (8px)
* **Workspace Spacing:** Section 2 split-screen panels float as containers with `p-8` spacing and a `gap-8` (32px gap) layout, ensuring symmetric margins on both sides of the screen.
* **Shadows:** Highly diffused, soft drop-shadows:
  * `shadow-soft: 0 8px 30px rgba(22, 25, 30, 0.03)`
  * `shadow-hover: 0 16px 40px rgba(22, 25, 30, 0.06)`

---

## 4. Animation & Motion Design

We enforce custom slow-motion physics for transitions to make the experience feel heavy, cinematic, and deliberate.

* **Transitions:** `transition-all duration-300 ease-out`
* **Scroll-Driven Spring Physics (Hero to Workspace):**
  * Smooth progress spring config: `stiffness: 45, damping: 25, mass: 1.2` for slow-motion reverse transitions.
  * Hero Content: translates up (`0` to `-150px`) and fades out over range `[0, 0.6]`.
  * Left Panel (Chat Pane): floats up from bottom (`500px` to `0px`) and fades in over range `[0.3, 0.85]`.
  * Right Panel (Visual Shop): floats up from bottom (`650px` to `0px`) and fades in over range `[0.35, 0.95]`.
* **Staggered Entrance Delays (Workspace active scroll-down):**
  * When scroll progress exceeds `0.4`, the workspace enters an active state.
  * Right-pane header text "Gifting Joy..." fades and slides in with a `1.0s` delay.
  * Journey Finder cards slide and fade in with a `1.2s` delay.
* **Continuous Background Video:**
  * The main scroll container and the `BackgroundAura` overlay are transparent, allowing the fixed background video to play continuously.
  * Visual shop results have zero grey overlays to ensure maximum video visibility.
  * Right-pane "Curated Selections" headers and action buttons are enclosed in a frosted glassmorphic label (`bg-white/5 border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md`) to guarantee high contrast over the video canvas.
* **Curtain Reveal (Preloader):**
  * Uses vertical clipping paths (`clip-path`) or sliding transforms. Splits into left and right wings moving off-screen.
* **Product Card Hover:**
  * Card scales up slightly (`scale-[1.02]`) and increases shadow.
  * Image inside scales up (`scale-105`) and triggers a soft cross-fade (`opacity-0` to `opacity-100`) to display the secondary detail/texture image.
* **Magnetic CTAs:**
  * Hovering within a 20px radius of a primary button triggers a gentle translate offset (`x` and `y`) pulling the element toward the cursor.
* **Delivery Lorry Timeline:**
  * Uses CSS keyframe path loops for the lorry bouncing (`0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-3px); }`).
  * Parallax scrolling background speed ratio: Sky = 0.1, Hills = 0.4, Tea Estates = 0.8, Road = 1.0.

---

## 5. UI Elements

* **Buttons:** Pill-shaped or soft-rounded with solid Terracotta clay fill transitioning to deep Slate Black on hover.
* **Inputs:** Minimalist outlined text boxes. On focus, the bottom border shifts from Warm Sand to Terracotta clay.
* **Visual Canvas:** Pure white panels resting over the Warm Alabaster background, styled as asymmetric cards to break up grid monotony.
